data.name: Feminization Factory
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Feminization Factory, the quirky idle clicker where transformation is just a click away! Your mission is simple yet endlessly fun: take an ordinary man and guide his journey into becoming a fabulous femboy. Every click inches him closer toward his dazzling new identity, while upgrades and special items unlock new layers of charm, style, and flair. Watch as plain masculinity blossoms into playful femininity, one upgrade at a time.

How to Play

Gameplay is easy to pick up and hard to put down:

  • Click, click, click! Each tap adds to your value, pushing the transformation forward.

  • Unlock upgrades to accelerate progress, evolve appearance, and boost efficiency.

  • Collect special items—lipstick, dresses, makeup, and more—each offering unique bonuses to increase femininity and flair.

  • Evolve step by step as your character transitions from simple man to adorable femboy, with every milestone bringing new surprises.

Whether you’re here for the satisfying clicker loop or the cheeky transformation theme, Feminization Factory offers a lighthearted and addictive journey into fabulousness.

data.short_description: Click your way through a cheeky transformation in Feminization Factory! Turn an ordinary man into a fabulous femboy with every tap, unlock upgrades, collect special items, and watch each stage of evolution sparkle with style, flair, and fun.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
